name: brainbrew
description: BrainBrew DevKit — agent chains, skills, and workflow orchestration for OpenCode

brainbrew._comment: Set routingModel to your preferred fast/cheap model for chain routing, e.g. 'openai/gpt-4o-mini', 'google/gemini-flash-2.0', 'anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5'. Leave empty to use keyword-only routing (no AI call).
